summary: Muratori posts a brief update explaining he couldn't write a full Witness Wednesday installment due to an unexpected time-critical Linux project. Instead, he shares a video demonstration of the Lister Panel UI element he had been detailing in previous posts. The original demo video couldn't be shared earlier due to game spoilers, so he recorded a new one in a spoiler-free area called CaseyTown. The post serves as a companion piece to his earlier technical write-ups about the Lister Panel code.
key_points: The Lister Panel is a UI element developed for The Witness that can display and navigate a large amount of game data
Spoiler concerns required recording a new demo video in a safe area rather than using the original team demo
The video is meant to contextualize the code walkthroughs from previous Witness Wednesday posts
money_quotes: The Lister Panel is capable of seeing a great many things.
This should help give you some perspective on what the code does when it's all put together.
key_insight: Seeing a UI system in action provides essential context for understanding the code behind it.
